page_content:
• A minimum of 9 credits must be at the 3xx or 4xx-level.

• All credits must be earned with a grade of "C-" or above.

• An overall GPA of 2.0 in the minor is required for graduation.

• A list of qualifying courses in each category is available from the Director of the Jewish Studies program.

• Up to 3 credits of 1xx or 2xx-level Hebrew or Yiddish language study may be credited toward the minor. In exceptional cases, students may petition to have other languages included.
